zh.Pontefract, West Yorkshire, England, Uni: 英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾朋特福拉可特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Pashley Sr於1406年7月出生在英國肯特斯斯時，他的父親Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst36歲，母親Philippa Sergeaux29歲。他和Elizabeth Woodville至少有1個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於1453年6月8日在他的家鄉享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭韋斯特 越可爾朋特福拉可特。

nameMeanings.name: Pashley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French passe lewe ‘cross the water’, probably used for a seafarer or sailor. Compare Parslow . The name was sometimes treated like a Norman habitational name by adding the preposition de, although no such placename has been identified in Normandy or neighboring regions.

habitational name from Pashley in the parish of Ticehurst, Sussex. The placename is from Old English Pæcces + lēah ‘Pæcca's wood or clearing’. A district of Eastbourne, Sussex, bearing this name derives it from the surname; a family called Pashley had moved there from Ticehurst by the later part of the 13th century.

variants.name: Parslow
meanings: English: Anglicized form of the Old French nickname passe lewe ‘cross the water’; see Pashley .

variants.name: Pasley
meanings: Scottish: variant of Paisley . Black suggests also that some examples of Pasley and Paisley may be derived from a place known as Pasley or Howpasley, in the Borders region.
Possibly an altered form of German Pasler, a variant of Basler , or of Pässler, an occupational name, from an agent derivative of basteln ‘to do handicraft’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   John  , also used quite frequently in the English-speaking world. In Northern Ireland it is sometimes found as a variant of   Ewan .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Pashley Sr was born in July 1406, in Smeeth, Kent, England, his father, Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst, was 36 and his mother, Philippa Sergeaux, was 29. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Elizabeth Woodville. He died on 8 June 1453, in his hometown, at the age of 46, and was buried in Pontefract, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Pashley Sr est né en juillet 1406, à Smeeth, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Philippa Sergeaux, avait 29 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Elizabeth Woodville. Il est décédé le 8 juin 1453, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterré à Pontefract, West Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Pontefract, West Yorkshire, England, Uni: Pontefract, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Pashley Sr im Juli 1406 in Smeeth, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst 36 und seine Mutter Philippa Sergeaux 29. Er hatte mit Elizabeth Woodville mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 8. Juni 1453 im Alter von 46 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Pontefract, West Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pashley Sr è nato il nel luglio 1406 nel Smeeth, Kent, England, il suo padre, Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Philippa Sergeaux, aveva 29 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Elizabeth Woodville. Morì il 8 giugno 1453, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolto a Pontefract, West Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Pashley Srが1406年7月にイギリスケントスメエスで生まれた時，父Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurstは36歳，母Philippa Sergeauxは29歳であった。彼はElizabeth Woodvilleとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は1453年6月8日に故郷で46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエスト ヨークシュアイアポンテフラクトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Pashley Sr(이)가 1406년 7월 영국 켄트 스메스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Philippa Sergeaux(은)는 29세였다. 그는 Elizabeth Woodville(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1453년 6월 8일 그의 고향에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트 요르크실르 폰테프라크트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Pashley Sr nasceu em julho de 1406, em Smeeth, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Philippa Sergeaux, tinha 29 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas com Elizabeth Woodville. Ele faleceu em 8 de junho de 1453, em sua cidade natal, com 46 anos, e foi sepultado em Pontefract, West Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Pashley Sr родился июль 1406 г. в местности смит, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Robert Pashley III of Smeeth and Ticehurst было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Philippa Sergeaux, 29. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Elizabeth Woodville. Он умер 8 июня 1453 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 46 лет и был похоронен в местности понтефракт, вест еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
